sections.heading: Document Overview
sections.content: The document is a Lease Agreement between the landlord and the tenant for a residential tenancy, signed on [6c7ecceb60a5] and [857306549920].

sections.heading: Parties Involved
sections.content: The parties involved are Rajesh Mehta, S/O Suresh Mehta, as the landlord, and Ananya Sharma, as the tenant, as stated in [857306549920].

sections.heading: Key Dates & Deadlines
sections.content: The key dates include the commencement date of April 1, 2024, and the termination date of March 31, 2025, as mentioned in [ebc26f7dd819]. The notice period is 2 months, as stated in [6c7ecceb60a5].

sections.heading: Financial Terms
sections.content: The monthly rent is Rs. 22,000/-, and the security deposit is Rs. 66,000/-, which is three months' rent, as mentioned in [ebc26f7dd819].

sections.heading: Key Obligations & Clauses
sections.content: The tenant is responsible for minor repairs below Rs. 500/-, and the landlord is responsible for major structural repairs, as stated in [86900ccabd38]. The tenant shall not sublet or assign premises without written consent of the landlord, as mentioned in [f868eb2922e4].

sections.heading: Flags & Risk Items
sections.content: Early vacating forfeits 1 month security deposit, as mentioned in [bf058e9754ca].

sections.heading: Recommended Actions
sections.content: Review the agreement for any discrepancies or omissions, and ensure that all parties understand their obligations and responsibilities, as the document has some partially unreadable sections [00959a394e4e].
